name: composite-dispatch still passes the --required and --tool-options args when they are present (non-empty path unchanged)
command: printf 'resource "aws_security_group" "b" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf --required-tools checkov 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'dispatch file=.* status=' e.txt && ! grep -q 'unbound variable' e.txt && echo required-path-intact 1>&2
